SEARCH
Package Business

Class ShopManager

java.lang.Object
Business.ShopManager
public class ShopManager extends Object
Manages shops, providing functionalities related to shop data and operations. This class includes methods for adding, removing, and retrieving information about shops and products.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ShopManager()
    Constructs a ShopManager and initializes the ShopJsonDAO.

    Method
    Description

    Adapts a generic Shop object to its specific subclass based on the business model.

  • Constructor Details

    • ShopManager

      public ShopManager()
      Constructs a ShopManager and initializes the ShopJsonDAO.

  • Method Details

    • workingShopDAO

      public boolean workingShopDAO() throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Checks if the ShopDAO is working.
      Returns:
      True if the ShopDAO is operational, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an exception occurs during the API call.

    • correctShopName

      public boolean correctShopName(String namePossible) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Checks if the provided shop name is correct by verifying its uniqueness among existing shops.
      Parameters:
      namePossible - The shop name to be checked.
      Returns:
      True if the shop name is correct (unique), false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an exception occurs during the API call.

    • correctShopYear

      public boolean correctShopYear(String attributePossible)
      Checks if the provided attribute for a shop's founding year is correct.
      Parameters:
      attributePossible - The attribute representing the founding year to be checked.
      Returns:
      True if the founding year attribute is correct (a non-negative integer), false otherwise.

    • addShop

      public void addShop(ArrayList<String> shopAttributes, String model, String extraShopAttribute) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Adds a new shop to the system based on the provided attributes.
      Parameters:
      shopAttributes - A list of attributes for the new shop, including name, description, founding year, and business model.
      model - The business model to which the shop belongs.
      extraShopAttribute - Additional attribute specific to certain business models.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an exception occurs during the API call.

    • insertAProduct

      public boolean insertAProduct(String productName, ArrayList<String> productNames)
      Checks if a product with the given name is already present in the list of products.
      Parameters:
      productName - The name of the product to check.
      productNames - The list of existing product names.
      Returns:
      True if the product with the given name is not present in the list, false otherwise.

    • insertAPriceForProduct

      public boolean insertAPriceForProduct(String productName, String priceS, ArrayList<String> productNames, ArrayList<Float> productMaxPrices)
      Validates and checks if the given price for a product is greater than the existing maximum price.
      Parameters:
      productName - The name of the product.
      priceS - The string representation of the price to be validated.
      productNames - The list of existing product names.
      productMaxPrices - The list of existing maximum prices for products.
      Returns:
      True if the price is valid and greater than the existing maximum price, false otherwise.

    • addProductToShop

      public boolean addProductToShop(String shopName, String productName, String price, String productBrand, ArrayList<String> reviewsFromProduct) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Adds a new product to a shop if the conditions are met.
      Parameters:
      shopName - The name of the shop where the product will be added.
      productName - The name of the product to be added.
      price - The price of the product.
      productBrand - The brand of the product.
      reviewsFromProduct - The list of reviews for the product.
      Returns:
      True if the product is not already in the shop or has the same price, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an exception occurs during the API call.

    • takeReviewsFromString

      public ArrayList<String> takeReviewsFromString(ArrayList<String> reviewsFromProduct)
      Extracts reviews from a list of strings containing ratings and reviews.
      Parameters:
      reviewsFromProduct - The list of strings containing ratings and reviews.
      Returns:
      The extracted list of reviews.

    • takeRatingFromString

      public ArrayList<String> takeRatingFromString(ArrayList<String> reviewsFromProduct)
      Extracts ratings from a list of strings containing ratings and reviews.
      Parameters:
      reviewsFromProduct - The list of strings containing ratings and reviews.
      Returns:
      The extracted list of ratings.

    • setSpecificProductToShop

      public void setSpecificProductToShop(String shopName, String productName, String price, String productBrand, ArrayList<String> ratings, ArrayList<String> reviews) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Adds a specific product to the catalogue of a shop. The specific product is created from the provided information, including the product name, price, brand, ratings, and reviews. If the shop does not exist, an ApiException is thrown.
      Parameters:
      shopName - The name of the shop to which the specific product will be added.
      productName - The name of the specific product.
      price - The price of the specific product.
      productBrand - The brand of the specific product.
      ratings - The list of ratings for the specific product.
      reviews - The list of reviews for the specific product.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If the shop is not found.

    • adaptShop

      public Shop adaptShop(Shop shop)
      Adapts a generic Shop object to its specific subclass based on the business model.
      Parameters:
      shop - The generic Shop object to adapt.
      Returns:
      A specific Shop subclass object based on the business model.

    • alreadyInJsonDAO

      public boolean alreadyInJsonDAO(String shopName, String productName) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Checks if a product with the given name is already present in the shop's catalogue.
      Parameters:
      shopName - The name of the shop.
      productName - The name of the product.
      Returns:
      True if the product is already in the shop's catalogue, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • samePriceForProduct

      public boolean samePriceForProduct(String shopName, String productName, String price) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Checks if a product with the same name and price is already present in the shop's catalogue.
      Parameters:
      shopName - The name of the shop.
      productName - The name of the product.
      price - The price of the product.
      Returns:
      True if the product with the same name and price is already in the shop's catalogue, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • getProductInfoFromShop

      public ArrayList<String> getProductInfoFromShop(String shopName, String infoParameter) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Retrieves product information from a shop's catalogue based on the specified parameter.
      Parameters:
      shopName - The name of the shop.
      infoParameter - The parameter for which the product information is requested (names, brands, or prices).
      Returns:
      A list containing the requested product information.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • removeProductFromAllShops

      public void removeProductFromAllShops(String productName) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Removes a product from the catalogue of all shops.
      Parameters:
      productName - The name of the product to be removed.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • removeProductFromShop

      public void removeProductFromShop(String productName, String shopName) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Removes a product from the catalogue of a specific shop.
      Parameters:
      productName - The name of the product to be removed.
      shopName - The name of the shop from which the product should be removed.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • getShopNamesForProduct

      public ArrayList<String> getShopNamesForProduct(String productName) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Retrieves the names of shops where a specific product is available.
      Parameters:
      productName - The name of the product.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList containing the names of shops where the product is available.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • getShopPricesForProduct

      public ArrayList<Float> getShopPricesForProduct(String productName) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Retrieves the prices of a specific product across different shops.
      Parameters:
      productName - The name of the product.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList containing the prices of the product in different shops.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • addReviewToProductInShop

      public void addReviewToProductInShop(String productSelected, String rating, String review) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Adds a review and rating to a specific product in a shop's catalogue.
      Parameters:
      productSelected - The name of the product to which the review and rating are added.
      rating - The rating to be added to the product.
      review - The review to be added to the product.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • getShopInfo

      public ArrayList<String> getShopInfo(String infoParameter) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Retrieves information about shops based on the specified parameter.
      Parameters:
      infoParameter - The parameter to determine the type of information to retrieve ("names", "years", or "descriptions").
      Returns:
      An ArrayList containing the requested shop information.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • productInAnyCatalogue

      public boolean productInAnyCatalogue(String productSelected) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Checks if a product exists in any shop's catalogue.
      Parameters:
      productSelected - The name of the product to check.
      Returns:
      True if the product exists in any catalogue, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • shopHasProducts

      public boolean shopHasProducts(String shopName) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Checks if a shop has any products in its catalogue.
      Parameters:
      shopName - The name of the shop to check.
      Returns:
      True if the shop has products, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • addMoreIncomeToShops

      public void addMoreIncomeToShops(ArrayList<String> shopNames, ArrayList<Float> moneyForShops) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Adds additional income to the specified shops.
      Parameters:
      shopNames - The names of the shops to which additional income will be added.
      moneyForShops - The additional income corresponding to each shop.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • getIncomesForShops

      public ArrayList<Float> getIncomesForShops(ArrayList<String> shopNames) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Gets the incomes for the specified shops.
      Parameters:
      shopNames - The names of the shops for which incomes will be retrieved.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList containing the incomes corresponding to each shop.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • thereAreShops

      public boolean thereAreShops() throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Checks if there are any shops in the system.
      Returns:
      True if there are shops, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

    • informShopDao

      public boolean informShopDao()
      Informs the shop DAO to create its data source.
      Returns:
      True if the shop DAO is successfully informed, false otherwise.

      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

      public String getCurrentDAOType()
      Gets the current type of the shop DAO.
      Returns:
      A String representing the current DAO type ("API", "JSON", or "Unknown").

      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.

      Gets additional information for shops based on the specified kind of extra attribute.
      Parameters:
      kindOfExtraAttribute - The kind of extra attribute for which information is requested.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList containing the requested additional information for each shop.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an error occurs during API interaction.
